mapper.select: SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, i.completed_at AS completedAt, i.last_scanned_at AS lastScannedAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.barcode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND i.location_id = #{locationId} AND i.product_id = #{productId} AND i.status = 'PENDING'

SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, i.completed_at AS completedAt, i.last_scanned_at AS lastScannedAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.barcode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND i.location_id = #{locationId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_task_items WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'PENDING'

SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, i.completed_at AS completedAt, i.last_scanned_at AS lastScannedAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.barcode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_task_items SET picked_qty = picked_qty + #{increment}, last_scanned_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND picked_qty + #{increment} <= required_qty
UPDATE batch_task_items SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_at END WHERE batch_task_item_id = #{batchTaskItemId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, p.product_name AS productName, p.barcode, l.location_code AS locationCode -- 지번 코드 추가 FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id JOIN zone_locations l ON i.location_id = l.location_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND i.status = 'PENDING' LIMIT 1

SELECT i.batch_task_item_id AS batchTaskItemId, i.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, i.product_id AS productId, i.location_id AS locationId, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.picked_qty AS pickedQty, i.status, p.product_name AS productName, p.barcode, l.location_code AS locationCode FROM batch_task_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id JOIN zone_locations l ON i.location_id = l.location_id WHERE i.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId}
